{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's white arm
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a white arm.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s white hand grabbed [[Juvari]] by the throat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's white arm]] is banded in [[halfsilver]] and wrapped in scripted cloth.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
